jp: 「音楽の切っ掛けは何だっけ。
父の持つレコードだったかな。
音を聞くことは気持ちが良い。
聞くだけなら努力もいらない。
前置きはいいから話そう。
ある時、思い付いたんだ。
この歌が僕の物になれば、
この穴は埋まるだろうか。
だから、僕は盗んだ」
嗚呼
まだ足りない。全部足りない。
何一つも満たされない。
このまま一人じゃあ
僕は生きられない。
もっと知りたい。愛を知りたい。
この心を満たすくらい
美しいものを知りたい。
「ある時に、街を流れる歌が
僕の曲だってことに気が付いた。
売れたなんて当たり前さ。
名作を盗んだものだからさぁ！
彼奴も馬鹿だ。こいつも馬鹿だ。
褒めちぎる奴等は皆馬鹿だ。
群がる烏合の衆、
本当の価値なんてわからずに。
まぁ、それは僕も同じか」
嗚呼、何かが足りない。
これだけ盗んだのに
少しも満たされない。
上面の言葉一つじゃ満たされない。
愛が知りたい。金が足りない。
この妬みを満たすくらい
美しいものを知りたい。
「音楽の切っ掛けが何なのか、
今じゃもう忘れちまったが
欲じゃないことは覚えてる。
何か綺麗なものだったな。
化けの皮なんていつか剥がれる。
見向きもされない夜が来る。
その時に見られる景色が
心底楽しみで。
そうだ。
何一つもなくなって、
地位も愛も全部なくなって。
何もかも失った後に見える夜は
本当に綺麗だろうから、
本当に、本当に綺麗だろうから、
僕は盗んだ」
嗚呼、まだ足りない。
もっと書きたい。
こんな詩じゃ満たされない。
君らの罵倒じゃあ
僕は満たされない。
まだ知らない愛を書きたい。
この心を満たすくらい
美しいものを知りたい。
まだ足りない。まだ足りない。
まだ足りない。まだ足りない。
まだ足りない。僕は足りない。
ずっと足りないものがわからない。
まだ足りない。もっと知りたい。
この身体を溶かすくらい
美しい夜を知りたい。
en: "What was the start of music, again.
Was it my father's records, maybe.
Listening to sounds feels good.
If it's just listening, no effort is needed.
Enough preface — let me just talk.
One day, I had an idea.
If this song became mine,
would the hole inside me get filled?
So, I stole."
Ah,
Still not enough. None of it's enough.
Not a single thing satisfies me.
Like this, on my own,
I can't go on living.
I want to know more. I want to know love.
Something so beautiful
it could fill this heart, I want to know.
"At one point, the song flowing through the streets —
I realized it was my own.
Of course it was a hit.
I'd stolen a masterpiece, after all!
That guy's a fool. This one's a fool too.
Everyone praising me to the skies — fools, all of them.
A swarming, mindless mob,
with no idea what's actually worth anything.
Well, I suppose I'm the same"
Ah, something is missing.
Even after stealing this much,
I'm not satisfied in the slightest.
Surface-level words alone don't satisfy me.
I want to know love. Money isn't enough.
Something beautiful enough
to fill this jealousy — I want to know it.
"What started me on music,
by now I've completely forgotten,
but I remember it wasn't greed.
It was something pretty, I think.
The mask comes off eventually.
A night when no one looks my way will come.
And the view I'll see at that moment —
I'm honestly looking forward to it.
That's right.
Once I've lost everything,
Status, love, all of it gone.
Because the night I see after losing it all
must really be beautiful,
really, really beautiful, surely,
I stole."
Ah, still not enough.
I want to write more.
Poems like this don't satisfy me.
Your insults aren't enough
to satisfy me.
I want to write a love I don't yet know.
Something beautiful enough
to fill this heart — I want to know it.
Still not enough. Still not enough.
Still not enough. Still not enough.
Still not enough. I am not enough.
I never know what's missing.
Still not enough. I want to know more.
A night beautiful enough
to melt this body away — I want to know it.

jp: 猿も木から落ちるし　正義は平気で嘘をつく
生憎わたしたちヒトの子です　素通りしないでね
しないでね？
あればあるで邪魔　居なきゃ居ないで不満
骨までは愛せない
たまに抱き合っていたい、じつに疑り深い
風に揺れるメロウ
言葉足らずでごめんな
あくびの向こうで　ほら探してくれ
泣いているのは君のせいじゃないから
ただ泣いてみたのは夜のせいでいいかな
ブルースカイ、届いてない
去る者には追われてナンボだ　合わすべくはテンポだ
あなたに求めたは情熱だけ、叶わぬ夢だけ
答え合わせの筈が
あくびをする意味まで探らないでよ
泣いているのは君のせいじゃないから
ただ泣いてみたけど捨て切れないの何でだ
ブルースカイ、聞こえてない
染まりたくはないが
そばに居た暮らしがちょっと好きだ
都会の足音、昨日と僕を素通りスルー
通り雨降る
止んで流れる　余計縋って痛くなる
モノクロの庭で戯け合ったのも幻になれ
泣いているのは君のせいじゃないから
ただ泣いてみたのは夜のせいでいいかな
ブルースカイ、届いてない
サヨナラグッバイ、笑ってスカイハイ
とりあえずまた明日
それでもいいかい？
これならいいかい？って何回も言う
泣いてみたのに、ただ泣いてみたのに
捨て切れないの何でだ
捨てられないの何でた
ブルースカイ、いつか届け
en: Even monkeys fall from trees, and justice tells lies without flinching
Unfortunately, we're just human children — please don't pass us by
Don't, okay?
When you're around you're in the way; when you're gone, I'm dissatisfied
I can't love you down to the bone
Sometimes I want to hold you close, in truth I'm full of doubt
A mellow swaying in the wind
Sorry I don't have the words
On the other side of a yawn — come on, look for me
Because the one crying isn't your fault
I just felt like crying — let's blame it on the night
Blue sky, you're not getting through
Those who leave, you chase to make it count — what to match is the tempo
All I asked of you was passion, and unreachable dreams alone
It was supposed to be a check of the answers
Don't even dig for the meaning of why I yawn
Because the one crying isn't your fault
I just felt like crying, but I can't throw it away — why is that
Blue sky, you're not hearing me
I don't want to be dyed your color, but
I kind of liked the life I had next to you
The footsteps of the city pass yesterday and me right by
A passing rain falls
It stops and flows on — clinging only makes it hurt more
Let even the playing-the-fool in that monochrome garden become an illusion
Because the one crying isn't your fault
I just felt like crying — let's blame it on the night
Blue sky, you're not getting through
Sayonara, goodbye, smile and sky-high
For now, see you tomorrow
Is that okay still?
How about this? — I keep saying it over and over
I tried crying, I just tried crying, but
I can't throw it away — why is that
I can't throw it away — why is that
Blue sky, someday, reach me

jp: (音聲点検)
訊こえるか、僕の存在証明讃歌が。
師走の崩落は、カフスの裡面二つが喰って死んだ。
ねえ僕は如何だ、如何様か。此れは電光朝露のゲイムだ。
欲張って頬張ったフラクタルは、腐った様だった。
宙に舞って銃を持って、もう目が廻って仕舞うわ！
ブレイクダウン。
僕のせいと、疑っているのは誰？
哀しくなって、言葉を売って、呼吸と二人法師になって。
最終回迄、僕は寸途、夢の中。
声を枯らして、愛を謳って、結末を待っている。
さらば！絶望的なハッピーエンド。
クラップハンズなど、必要無いわ！
今に、ステップイントウ！
踵鳴らす僕は二十三、時計と愛。
匿名の音楽は、肥育の外連一つを孕んで飛んだ。
方や僕は何だ、何様だ。此れは半信半疑のルウルだ。
散らかった芥は迷路の如く、僕を勾引して行った。
點となって綫となって、嗚呼。気が狂って終うわ！
ブレイクダウン。
全部、全部、間違っているのは誰？
哀しくなって、言葉を売って、呼吸と二人法師になって。
カアテンコウル迄、秘密は屹度、夜の中。
目を瞑って、偽名を貼って、行場を探している。
さらば！絶望的なハッピーエンド。
クラップハンズなど、必要ないわ！
名前を呼んで、僕を探して。帷で独人法師になって。
エンドロウル迄、記憶は寸途僕の中。
忘れないで、思い出して。
徒花が咲いている夜に、鳴り響くファンフアレ！
哀しくなって、言葉を売って、呼吸と二人法師になって。
最終回迄、僕は寸途、夢の中。
声を枯らして、愛を謳って、結末を待っている。
さらば！絶望的なハッピーエンド。
クラップハンズなど、必要無い！
終生は其の熏み付いた白月と酷似している。
三分と少しのエラーは、呼吸を開始した
en: (Sound check)
Can you hear it — my anthem of self-existence-proof.
December's collapse — both insides of my cuffs ate it up and died.
Hey, what am I — what kind of thing am I? This is a flash-of-lightning, morning-dew game.
The fractal I greedily stuffed into my cheeks looked rotten.
Dancing in midair, holding a gun — my eyes are about to start spinning out!
Breakdown.
Suspecting it's my fault — who is it?
Growing sad, selling out the words, becoming a two-person monk with my own breath.
Until the final episode, I'll be right up against the edge, inside a dream.
Going hoarse, singing of love, waiting for the ending.
Farewell! The desperate happy end.
I don't need clap-hands or anything!
Now then, step into!
Heels clicking, I'm twenty-three, with my watch and love.
The anonymous music gave birth to a single fattened-up gimmick and took flight.
On the other hand, what am I — who do I think I am? This is a half-believing, half-doubting rule.
The scattered trash, like a maze, abducted me and went off.
Becoming a dot, becoming a line — ah. I'm going to lose my mind!
Breakdown.
All of it, all of it — who's the one who's wrong?
Growing sad, selling out the words, becoming a two-person monk with my own breath.
Until the curtain call, the secret will surely be inside the night.
Closing my eyes, sticking on a fake name, I'm searching for somewhere to go.
Farewell! The desperate happy end.
I don't need clap-hands or anything!
Call my name, search for me. In the curtain, become a one-person monk.
Until the end roll, the memory will be right there, inside me.
Don't forget. Remember.
On a night when the futile flowers are blooming, the fanfare rings out!
Growing sad, selling out the words, becoming a two-person monk with my own breath.
Until the final episode, I'll be right up against the edge, inside a dream.
Going hoarse, singing of love, waiting for the ending.
Farewell! The desperate happy end.
I don't need clap-hands or anything!
A whole lifetime closely resembles that smoke-stained white moon.
An error, three minutes and a little, has begun to breathe.

jp: 君と眺めてた
星を集めた窓に
映してた
また 指折り数えた
瞬間を重ねた夜に
問いかけた
時を止めた
すきだよと言えば はぐらかした
気がつかないフリは もうやめて＞＜
隣にいるとき
私の軌道はいつも
周極星
トレモロみたいに
波打つ思考の角度
つかめない
君を追えば
なにかを失ってしまいそうな
想い浮かべ 船を出す
抱きしめて 出会わなければ個々
受け止めて デネボラを飛び越え行くわ
ワガママな歳差 星のようだね
追いかけて うかぶパノラマ
五線の上で 流れ星
いま歌うから 照らしてよね スピカ
笑っていたいよ ひとりはイヤだよ
答えが聞きたい 怖くて聞けない
夜をいくつも過ごして 未来へ繋ぐの
またたく星をよけ 探してた
神話は 誰の味方なの?
ため息で 落ち込んでいた午後
想うだけ 君の名をひとりつぶやくわ
あさはかな愛じゃ 届かないよね
会いたくて ピアノ奏でた音
苦しくて 溢れ出す
余韻嫋々 君に届け
抱きしめて 出会わなければ個々
受け止めて デネポラを飛び越え行くわ
ワガママな歳差 星のようだね
追いかけて うかぶパノラマ
五線の上で 流れ星
いま歌うから 照らしてよね スピカ
en: I was watching with you,
reflected in the window full of stars
we'd gathered together
Again, counting on my fingers,
on a night of layered moments
I asked the question
I stopped time
When I said "I love you," you brushed it aside
Stop pretending not to notice >.<
When I'm beside you,
my orbit is always
a circumpolar star
Like a tremolo,
the angle of my rippling thoughts
I can't catch it
If I chase you,
I feel like I'd lose something
Picturing it in mind, I set out the boat
Hold me — if we hadn't met, we'd each be alone
Catch me — I'm flying past Denebola
Selfish precession — like the stars, isn't it?
Chasing, the panorama floats up
On the staff lines, a shooting star
I'll sing now, so shine on me, Spica
I want to keep smiling, I don't want to be alone
I want to hear an answer, I'm too scared to ask
Spending so many nights, connecting them to the future
Dodging the twinkling stars, I was searching
Whose side is the myth on?
An afternoon I'd spent slumping with sighs
Just thinking of you, I murmur your name to myself
Shallow love won't reach you, will it?
Wanting to see you, the sounds I played on the piano
Painfully, overflow
The lingering tones — reach you
Hold me — if we hadn't met, we'd each be alone
Catch me — I'm flying past Denebola
Selfish precession — like the stars, isn't it?
Chasing, the panorama floats up
On the staff lines, a shooting star
I'll sing now, so shine on me, Spica

en: Spoil me sweetly, okay?
The things I don't know — big sis, teach me
I'm the youngest-child paradox,
I guess?
Today again,
you meet my eye-level just because I'm younger
and nod along with that "what a pain" face
Makeup and fashion too —
I'm the one on the cutting edge
I feel a generation gap — tekumakumayakon
Magic to turn into an adult —
I wish that existed. Or something like that
Don't treat me like a kid,
but I still want you to spoil me
Just as I am
Let me stay by your side —
I can't say things like that
Spoil me sweetly, okay?
The things I don't know — big sis, teach me
Selfishness, the cute manipulative stuff too,
the head-over-heels smiles
But, what I don't want is to be a child
When I stretch up on tiptoe, let go of my hand
I'm the youngest-child paradox,
maybe?
Surrounded every day by the beloved
older sisters who suddenly appeared one day
It's okay to be clumsy,
and only I am special
I get jealous of the other younger kids
I want to be the only one
you dote on. Or something like that
Don't treat me like a kid,
but sometimes I want you to come to me for advice
Let me support you, just as I am
I can't say things like that
Spoil me sweetly, okay?
The things I don't know — big sis, teach me
Selfishness, the cute manipulative stuff too,
the head-over-heels smiles
But, what I don't want is to be a child
When I stretch up on tiptoe, let go of my hand
I'm the youngest-child paradox
Someday,
I'll become an older sister too
and like the everyone I love,
I'll wrap them up in my arms
I can't put it into words —
I get embarrassed
so let me put it on a melody
Even if I'm born again,
I want to be by your sides again,
with all of you
Spoil me sweetly, okay?
The things I don't know — big sis, teach me
Selfishness, the cute manipulative stuff too,
the head-over-heels smiles
But, what I don't want is to be a child
When I stretch up on tiptoe, let go of my hand
I'm the youngest-child paradox
...just kidding
